arabic: يُعَدُّ الْكُسْكُسُ طَبَقًا رَئِيسِيًّا فِي الْمَطْبَخِ الْمَغْرِبِيِّ. يُصْنَعُ مِنَ الْقَمْحِ الْمَطْحُونِ وَيُطْهَى بِالْبُخَارِ. يُقَدَّمُ مَعَ الْخُضَارِ وَاللَّحْمِ فِي طَبَقٍ كَبِيرٍ مُشْتَرَكٍ. تَجْلِسُ الْعَائِلَةُ حَوْلَهُ وَتَأْكُلُ مَعًا. الْكُسْكُسُ لَيْسَ طَعَامًا فَقَطْ بَلْ هُوَ رَمْزٌ لِلتَّجَمُّعِ وَالْوَحْدَةِ.
translation: Kuskus je osnovno jelo marokanskog kuhinja. Pravi se od mljevene pšenice i kuha na pari. Servira se s povrćem i mesom u velikom zajedničkom tanjiru. Porodica sjedi oko njega i jede zajedno. Kuskus nije samo hrana već simbol zajedništva i sloge.
translationEn: Couscous is a staple dish of Moroccan cuisine. It is made from ground wheat and cooked by steaming. It is served with vegetables and meat in a large shared dish. The family sits around it and eats together. Couscous is not just food but a symbol of togetherness and unity.
